title: Murshmallow
description: Murshmallow is a modpack with excellent visualization and optimization, as well as magic and quests for a better immersion.
body:
Everything has been improved in the modpack.The modpack has good optimization
## Caves
Added 5 new caves from the Alex caves mod, as well as to get any mineral you will have to polish it on a whetstone, the caves have become much more beautiful
## Utilites
The modpack contains many auxiliary items such as atlas and gliders.
## New Dungeons
All villages have been heavily modified and redesigned, as well as added support for different mods. New bosses with their own mechanics have also been added. Added many new dungeons
## Quests
There are quests in the modpack, the volume of which increases with each update.
## Relax
In the modpack, you can relax by farming or building machinery or photographing beautiful nature with your camera.
## Create cozy house
Create a cozy home that feels warm and cozy.
## Magic
Strong spells have been added to the modpack to counter the bosses.
## Portal
To open the portal to the end, you will have to find the 12 eyes of the end.
